agentApp.lab.boundary.description: This Lab proves the App Host is removable without leaking experiment state into product paths.
agentApp.lab.boundary.noRegistry: Does not write to command, skill, artifact, or workspace global registries.
agentApp.lab.boundary.noRuntime: By default, App UI bundles, workers and workflows do not run; P3/P4.2 only allow controlled UI Host and allow-listed workflow DSL.
agentApp.lab.boundary.noStorage: Does not create real App storage namespaces; it only previews cleanup.

agentApp.lab.capability.description: Derived from requires, runtimePackage, storage, and entry declarations.

agentApp.lab.cleanup.description: P15 shows what failure, uninstall, or delete-data would clean without deleting non-Agent App data.
agentApp.lab.cleanup.empty: No cleanup targets in this category for P0.

agentApp.lab.contentDemo.completed: Content factory loop completed. Project, content scenarios, assets, Artifact, and Evidence all carry agent_app provenance.
agentApp.lab.contentDemo.description: Runs project creation, knowledge binding, content scenario planning, content assets, content-table Artifact, and Evidence through adapter capabilities.

agentApp.lab.contentDemo.title: APP Content Factory P4 Demo
agentApp.lab.description: The Lab connects Agent App package review, cache verification, installed state, setup, permissions, launch, App Manager, and cleanup preview without entering the production path.
agentApp.lab.entries.description: Entries render as lab-only projections and do not enter command, Skill Catalog, or Workspace routes.
agentApp.lab.entries.title: Entry Projection
agentApp.lab.footer: The route is now at P16 Agent App Manager / Product Entry Gate; multi-app lifecycle, permission review, GUI smoke, and cleanup rehearsal are still required before a production entry.
agentApp.lab.guard.description: P14 merges package verification, readiness, setup, and permission summaries before an entry runs or mounts.
agentApp.lab.guard.empty: Run or open a UI entry to see the P14 guard decision here.

agentApp.lab.guard.summary.blocked: Package, readiness, or runtime policy blockers stopped this entry.
agentApp.lab.guard.summary.denied: Required permission was denied, so the entry will not run.
agentApp.lab.guard.summary.needs-setup: Required setup is missing, so the guard stopped this entry.
agentApp.lab.guard.title: Entry Runtime Guard
agentApp.lab.installFlow.description: P15 connects source, package review, verified cache, installed state, setup, permission prompt, launch, and cleanup into a Lab-only loop.

agentApp.lab.installFlow.setupResolved: The Lab sample setup resolves all required bindings.
agentApp.lab.installFlow.title: Lab Install And Launch Flow
agentApp.lab.manager.description: P16 turns the single Lab flow into an experimental App management surface for installed apps, entry launcher, disable / uninstall, and cleanup evidence.

agentApp.lab.package.description: The Lab reads the local fixture, computes package and manifest identity, then lets the P15 install flow verify the cache.
agentApp.lab.package.title: Package Preview
agentApp.lab.readiness.description: P15 explains host and setup gaps; the sample setup is Lab-only and never writes to a real workspace.
agentApp.lab.readiness.title: Readiness Check
agentApp.lab.run.adapterDescription: P2 validates the real adapter boundary for storage, Artifact, and Evidence through a local adapter store. It still does not execute App UI or workers.

plugin.marketplace.title: Plugin Center
plugin.marketplace.description: Read the cloud marketplace, merge local install state, and show installable, activatable, renderable, and read-only history states.
plugin.marketplace.cloudRequired.title: Cloud account required
plugin.marketplace.cloudRequired.descrip: Connect a cloud account to read the tenant plugin catalog. Installed local plugins can still enter the runtime path through explicit @ mentions.
plugin.marketplace.search.label: Search plugins
plugin.marketplace.search.placeholder: Search plugin name, key, or purpose
plugin.marketplace.category.label: Plugin category
plugin.marketplace.error.title: Plugin marketplace failed to load
plugin.marketplace.empty.title: No matching plugins
plugin.marketplace.empty.description: Clear filters or wait for the cloud marketplace to publish available plugins.
plugin.marketplace.actionError.title: Plugin action failed
plugin.marketplace.blocker.activationBlo: This entry is not available yet. Finish app setup first.
plugin.marketplace.blocker.activationEnt: This entry has not been configured yet, so it cannot be opened.
plugin.marketplace.blocker.disabled: This app is disabled. Enable it before using it.
plugin.marketplace.blocker.generic: This status needs attention before you can continue.
plugin.marketplace.blocker.installUnavai: This catalog item is not open for installation yet.
plugin.marketplace.blocker.installedPack: The local package does not match the marketplace version. Reinstall it.
plugin.marketplace.blocker.marketplaceBl: Marketplace authorization is required before installation.
plugin.marketplace.detailActionTitle: View plugin policy, package reference, and blockers
plugin.marketplace.detail.emptyDescripti: Use the list to inspect policy, package reference, blockers, and the next action.
plugin.marketplace.detail.nextStepInstal: Install into local app state first, then run it through an explicit @ plugin entry.
plugin.marketplace.detail.nextStepRegist: Enter the enterprise registration code first, then refresh before installing.
plugin.marketplace.detail.nextStepEnable: Enable the installed plugin first, then open a new task through the explicit @ plugin entry.
plugin.marketplace.detail.nextStepOpen: Open a new task with the @ plugin mention prefilled; the user still confirms before sending.
plugin.marketplace.detail.nextStepHistor: History is read-only for now. Continue editing after the history landing page is connected.
plugin.marketplace.detail.nextStepBlocke: Clear the blockers first. The app will not auto-install, enable, or run this plugin.
plugin.marketplace.detail.skillsDescript: Choose a capability to open a new task with @plugin:capability prefilled; the user still confirms before sending.
plugin.marketplace.detail.skillsBlocked: Install, enable, and clear blockers before opening a new task from a capability.
plugin.marketplace.capability.title: Capability orchestration
plugin.marketplace.capability.descriptio: Review how this plugin connects Agents, Subagents, tools, authorization, and Skills in Lime.
plugin.marketplace.capability.appliedAge: The main app and default entry declared by the plugin.
plugin.marketplace.capability.subagentsD: Task lanes and production objects that can be orchestrated.
plugin.marketplace.capability.workflowsD: Task flows, trigger intents, and output artifacts declared by the plugin.
plugin.marketplace.capability.cliToolsDe: Host-controlled local workers or tool declarations.
plugin.marketplace.capability.connectors: Data, account, API, or external app connections required by the workflow.
plugin.marketplace.capability.hooksDescr: Plugin hooks for prompt submission, task completion, and other runtime stages.
plugin.marketplace.capability.appAuthori: Install, authorization, and capability dependency state.
plugin.marketplace.capability.skillsDesc: Reusable Skills declared or referenced by the plugin.
plugin.marketplace.history.entryBanner: Opened the plugin read-only history entry. No plugin action will run automatically.
plugin.marketplace.historySelection.desc: Choose a {{plugin}} history session before opening restore. No plugin action will run automatically.
plugin.marketplace.historySelection.empt: No local history sessions were found for this plugin.
plugin.marketplace.writeActionTitle: Use the local app install path
plugin.marketplace.readOnlyAction: This state cannot be handled directly. Clear blockers first.
plugin.marketplace.management.title: Local management
plugin.marketplace.management.descriptio: Manage the local install state. Uninstall removes the app state and keeps data, without writing back to the cloud marketplace.
plugin.marketplace.management.uninstallT: Uninstall the local plugin and keep data
plugin.marketplace.registration.title: Install authorization
plugin.marketplace.registration.descript: This plugin requires an enterprise registration code first. Submitting refreshes marketplace state; it will not auto-install or run.
